name: Apricot 18x24 Gable Shed Plan - Modern Workshop, Garden Studio, or Backyard Office | DIY Shed Design (PDF)
open_features: A spacious 432 sq ft structure offering plenty of room for organized storage, equipment, or a dedicated hobby workshop.
The traditional roofline provides excellent durability, efficient water drainage, and extra vertical interior space.
Designed with standard framing methods and clear structural layout, making it ideal for both beginner and experienced builders.
Strategically placed entry and windows provide natural light, easy access, and improved airflow throughout the interior.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Apricot Gable Roof Shed - a spacious 18x24 multi-purpose shed designed for durability, efficiency, and timeless backyard style. Featuring a traditional gable roofline, balanced window placement, and clean exterior siding, Apricot delivers a classic structure with generous interior space and endless functional possibilities. The 18x24 footprint offers a comfortable amount of room for organized storage, workshop space, hobby projects, or backyard eq...
